column1: # Representative real-world thermal efficiencies by cycle and application.
# Figures are typical net (brake or plant) values
# orientation only; specific machines vary widely. cycle: cycle family.
# application: machine class. eta_typical: typical realised efficiency.
# eta_carnot_ref: Carnot bound for the stated reservoir pair (where defined).

column2: t_cold_C: reservoir temperatures used for the Carnot reference.
